name: LeddarTech Holdings Inc.
description: LeddarTech Holdings Inc. is a technology company that specializes in developing and providing comprehensive AI-based fusion and perception software solutions. These innovative technologies are designed to enable the deployment of advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS), autonomous driving (AD), and parking applications. By leveraging sophisticated software, LeddarTech helps automotive manufacturers and Tier 1 suppliers enhance vehicle safety and automation capabilities. Headquartered in Canada, the company focuses on delivering scalable, high-performance perception software that integrates data from various sensors to provide a reliable environmental model for intelligent transportation systems.
